description: Directory layout for Tier-B Windows installer staging (tools + flocks repo root, no prebuilt .venv).
install_root_children: tools/chrome (Chrome for Testing from build-staging.ps1; includes flocks-bundled-chrome.exe.relative.txt)

environment.FLOCKS_INSTALL_ROOT: Absolute path to install root (contains bin/, tools/, flocks/). Optional; used to derive defaults.
environment.FLOCKS_REPO_ROOT: Absolute path to repository root = {install_root}/flocks (contains pyproject.toml).
environment.FLOCKS_NODE_HOME: Directory containing node.exe (typically {install_root}/tools/node). Overrides PATH order for WebUI.
environment.FLOCKS_ROOT: User data directory (logs, run, workspace outputs); set by installer wizard.
